name: Gerald Albright
abstract: Gerald Albright (born August 30, 1957) is an American jazz saxophonist. He earned Grammys for the albums 24/7 in 2012 and Slam Dunk in 2014 and was nominated for New Beginnings in 2008 and for Sax for Stax in 2009.

concerts.label: Phil Collins Big Band
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] But we had Gerald Albright, and we had Supersax.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nancy Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
